title: picris squarrosa
intro: Picris squarrosa, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard or Rough Picris, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects that can help to protect against oxidative stress and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Picris squarrosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea.
